events_with_summaries.summary_text: Open Office Hours for the New Incident Intake Walmart Claims Services is hosting open office hours to help with the new Incident Intake system, which replaces the Accident app and IRS. Join Mondays and Thursdays from March 23 through April 30, 2 to 3 p.m. Central. Drop in anytime with questions or issues.
